branding.description: Logo, colors, custom domain, and outgoing email identity for this tenant. Changes apply to hosted login pages and transactional emails.

visualIdentity.title: Visual identity
visualIdentity.description: Used in hosted sign-in, emails, and the admin sidebar.
visualIdentity.primaryColorHelp: Used for buttons, links, and accents on the sign-in page.
visualIdentity.secondaryColorHelp: Page background color behind the sign-in card.

customDomain.title: Custom domain
customDomain.description: Where your hosted login pages are served (e.g. auth.acme.com).
customDomain.label: Domain
customDomain.help: DNS + TLS provisioning happens out-of-band today. We'll show status here once the custom-domain wizard ships.

outgoingEmail.title: Outgoing email
outgoingEmail.description: Sender identity used on magic links, OTP codes, password reset, invites.

preview.title: Live preview
preview.description: How your hosted sign-in page will look.

billing.description: Your subscription plan, billed in your chosen currency. Invoices are generated each period.

currentPlan.title: Current plan
currentPlan.cancelConfirmDescription: Access continues until the end of the current period.

invoices.title: Invoices
invoices.description: Generated at the start of each billing period.

general.description: The display name, plan, and region for this workspace. The slug is immutable.

profile.title: Profile
profile.description: Visible to members of this tenant.
profile.slugHelp: Immutable. Used in tenant URLs and SCIM/SAML metadata.
profile.name: Name
profile.statusHelp: Suspending blocks new logins for everyone in this tenant.

tenantId.title: Tenant ID
tenantId.description: Reference value used by SCIM, SAML and API calls.

domains.description: Bring your own domain for hosted login pages (e.g. auth.acme.com). The DNS + TLS provisioning wizard isn't built yet — for now we just store the hostname against the tenant's branding record.

pendingBanner.title: DNS + TLS automation pending.
pendingBanner.description: Saving here only persists the hostname. The 4-step DNS-verification + ACM-provisioning wizard is on the Phase 3 admin spec — see documents/IMPLEMENTATION-STATUS.md. Today you must front qeet-id with your own reverse proxy.

custom.title: Custom domain
custom.description: One domain per tenant. Leave blank to use the default Qeet ID-hosted URL.
custom.label: Domain
custom.dnsHelp: Records aren't enforced yet; we'll start checking them in the DNS-verification wizard.

emailTemplates.description: Customise the transactional emails Qeet ID sends. Unedited templates use the built-in defaults.

editor.subject: Subject
editor.variablesHelp: Insert these placeholders; they're filled in when the email is sent.
